records.ety: [Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ to teach; akin to L. docere to teach: cf. F. didactique. See Docile.]

defs: Fitted or intended to teach; conveying instruction; preceptive; instructive; teaching some moral lesson; as, didactic essays.
quotes: The finest didactic poem in any language.

defs: excessively prone to instruct, even those who do not wish to be instructed; -- of people.
